mapper.sql: id, user_id, client_id, session_id, title, schedule_type, start_time, end_time, location, description, color, remind_type, remind_sent, status, is_recurring, recurring_rule, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_schedule ( user_id, client_id, session_id, title, schedule_type, start_time, end_time, location, description, color, remind_type, remind_sent, status, is_recurring, recurring_rule, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{clientId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sessionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{scheduleType, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{startTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{endTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{location, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{color, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remindType, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remindSent, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{isRecurring, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{recurringRule, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_schedule WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_schedule ORDER BY start_time DESC

SELECT
FROM t_schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY start_time DESC

SELECT
FROM t_schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} AND remind_sent = 0 AND status IN (1, 4) AND start_time BETWEEN #{startTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} AND #{endTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} ORDER BY start_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_schedule SET remind_sent = #{remindSent, jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT s.,
FROM t_schedule s
WHERE s.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY s.start_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_schedule WHERE user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_schedule ( user_id, client_id, session_id, title, schedule_type, start_time, end_time, location, description, color, remind_type, remind_sent, status, is_recurring, recurring_rule, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.userId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.clientId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.sessionId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.title, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.scheduleType, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.startTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.endTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.location, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.description, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.color, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.remindType, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.remindSent, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.isRecurring, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.recurringRule, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM t_schedule WHERE id IN
#{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}
